description: A retailer reports that part of their recent shipment arrived damaged.

nodes.task_description: Receive the claim from the retailer, including photos of the damaged items.

expected_outcome.value: Agent logs the claim and saves the photos.

nodes.task_description: Verify the claim against the order details.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the damaged items were part of the recent order.

nodes.task_description: Issue a credit memo to the retailer for the value of the damaged goods.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a credit memo on the retailer's account.

nodes.task_description: Arrange for a replacement shipment of the damaged items.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new, no-charge sales order for the replacement items.
